gate.go_comfyui: Go to ComfyUI page to start

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.positive_placeholder: Enter prompt (A1111 format), e.g.: 1girl, solo, long hair, looking at viewer, smile, white dress, outdoors, blue sky, masterpiece, best quality
prompt.negative_placeholder: Enter negative prompt, e.g.: worst quality, low quality, blurry, bad anatomy, bad hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, watermark, text

tools.llm_assist_title: Generate or refine prompts with AI
tools.prompt_editor_title: Visual tag editor with autocomplete and tag library

help.comma_desc: Describe each element with a phrase, separated by commas
help.weight_up_desc: Increase influence on generation, value > 1.0 means stronger
help.weight_down_desc: Value < 1.0 weakens influence, can also fine-tune negative prompts
help.embedding_desc: Use installed Embedding vectors (browse via toolbar 'Insert Embedding')
help.quality_desc: Positive: include masterpiece, best quality. Negative: include worst quality, low quality
help.random_pick_desc: → red hair / green hair / blue hair
help.random_multi_desc: → cat, dog / cat, bird / dog, bird
help.nesting_desc: → a big cat / a small cat / a red ball / a blue ball

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.sampler_help: Controls the image generation algorithm. euler is fast and stable, dpmpp_2m produces higher quality but is slightly slower. Use default if unsure
advanced.scheduler_help: Controls the magnitude of change at each sampling step. normal is most versatile, karras may produce finer details. Use default if unsure
advanced.seed_help: Same seed + same parameters = same image. Click the dice icon to toggle random/fixed mode
advanced.batch_help: Number of images generated per run. Random prompts and random seeds use the same result across multiple images
advanced.prefix_help: Save path and filename for generated images. Default uses date folders and timestamps to ensure unique filenames. Cloud sync may overwrite same-named files, keeping timestamps is recommended

preview.offline_desc: Generate requires ComfyUI service to work

lora.empty_warn: Please add LoRA first before enabling

i2i.denoise_help: Controls similarity to the original image. Lower values stay closer to the original, higher values produce more changes. 0.3=minor, 0.5=moderate, 0.7=major repaint
i2i.select_ref: Please select a reference image first
i2i.no_image_for_mask: Please select a reference image first
i2i.grow_mask_by_help: Auto-expand mask edges by this many pixels for smoother transitions between repainted and original areas. Recommended: 4-8

mask_editor.title: Mask Editor
mask_editor.help: Use brush to mark areas for regeneration (red overlay), unmarked areas will be preserved

controlnet.strength_help_pose: Controls how strictly the pose constraint is applied. Higher values follow the skeleton map more strictly
controlnet.strength_help_canny: Controls how strictly the edge constraint is applied. Higher values follow the edge map more strictly
controlnet.strength_help_depth: Controls how strictly the depth constraint is applied. Higher values follow the depth map more strictly
controlnet.start_help: Sampling step ratio where ControlNet starts (0.0 = from beginning)
controlnet.end_help: Sampling step ratio where ControlNet stops (1.0 = until end)
controlnet.need_model: Please install a ControlNet model first
controlnet.need_ref: Please upload a reference image first
controlnet.low_threshold_help: Lower edge detection threshold. Pixels below this value won't be considered edges. Lower values detect more detail, higher values reduce noise
controlnet.high_threshold_help: Upper edge detection threshold. Pixels above this value are confirmed as edges. A larger gap between thresholds yields fewer edges
controlnet.detect_resolution_help: Preprocessor input resolution. Higher values capture more detail but run slower
controlnet.preprocess_blocked: Please wait for the current task to finish

upscale.need_model: Please install an upscale model first
upscale.need_download: This feature requires upscale model download
upscale.method_help: Overlap checkerboard eliminates tile seams, suitable for most scenes; standard mode is fastest but may show seams
upscale.tile_size_help: Number of tiles processed at once. Higher values are faster but use more VRAM; reduce if running out of memory
upscale.downscale_method_help: Interpolation algorithm used when scaling from 4x to target size at 2x/3x. Not used at 4x

hires.denoise_help: Controls how much the second pass modifies the image. Lower values stay closer to original, higher values add more detail but may deviate from composition. Recommended 0.3-0.5
hires.steps_help: Sampling steps for the second pass. More steps produce finer details but take longer. Usually 15-25 is sufficient

interrogate.title: Interrogate Settings
interrogate.general_threshold_help: Confidence threshold for general tags. Lower values detect more tags but may be inaccurate, higher values are more precise but may miss some
interrogate.character_threshold_help: Confidence threshold for character tags. Higher threshold recommended for character recognition to reduce false positives
interrogate.replace_underscore_help: Replace underscores in tags with spaces, making output more suitable for prompts
interrogate.exclude_tags_help: Specify tags to exclude. Commonly used to filter background, rating, and other irrelevant tags
interrogate.empty_result: Interrogation complete but no tags found
interrogate.need_model: This feature requires downloading a tagger model

llm_modal.title: AI Prompt
llm_modal.text_placeholder:
Describe the scene you want in natural language, e.g.:
A red-haired girl quietly reading in a library, with sunlight streaming through the window
llm_modal.not_configured: AI prompt feature requires LLM service configuration
llm_modal.no_vision: Current LLM does not support Vision
llm_modal.result_hint: Describe your scene, AI will generate corresponding prompts

toast.no_output: Cannot retrieve output images, please check the ComfyUI page
toast.wait_workflow: Please wait for current workflow to finish or cancel
toast.meta_not_loaded: Details require loading Models page first

error.modules_not_enabled: Some features are configured but not enabled
error.modules_not_enabled_desc: Parameters are configured but toggles are off. They will not take effect after submission.
error.cn_no_ref: {type} is enabled but no reference uploaded, please upload or uncheck
error.cn_no_model: {type} has no available models, please confirm ComfyUI is running
error.i2i_no_ref: Img2Img is enabled but no reference uploaded, please upload or uncheck
error.inpaint_no_mask_desc: Inpaint mode is active but no mask has been drawn. Will run as standard Img2Img instead.

model_dep.select_at_least_one: Please select at least one model
